instructions: Refactor neos-liveuser-setup and neos-installer-partition.sh to ensure robust error handling and structured initialization sequences.
Verify that Btrfs filesystem expectations are explicitly met without relying on unstable parsing of mount files.
constraints: Limit modifications strictly to the defined target files to prevent feature creep.
Do not introduce any new external dependencies or binaries.
Ensure all file generation and permission setting follow secure practices (e.g., umask 077, no TOCTOU chmod).
